content:
A quick guide to and runthrough of the changes made for the Morimens 2nd Anniversary patch to make sure you don't miss any dailies or Silver! Characters are only briefly covered this time so that the video doesn't last hours. Hope it helps as always. 🩷 
https://youtu.be/X0DxJ4UyCO8

embeds.title: An Actually Brief 2nd Anniversary Morimens Guide
embeds.description:
Going through the myriad changes made to Morimens as quickly as possible, and how to do your new dailies/weeklies!
0:00 Introduction
0:30 Store Updates
1:53 New Covenants
2:57 Darkness Heart Wheels Guide
7:20 D-Jewel Exchange
8:16 Phantasmal Dive Changes
11:20 Traphase Changes & Levels
12:07 Claimin
